name: OpenDi.us
title_tag: Manage Your Business Information on Opendi with Synup
tags: france; germany; netherlands; spain-es; australia; new-zealand; canada; united-kingdom-gb; united-states-us
detailed_paragraph:
OpenDi.us + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on OpenDi.us with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is OpenDi.us?

OpenDi.us is an online platform that offers business listings and information for various local businesses and services. It assists users in discovering and connecting with businesses in their vicinity, providing a convenient resource for those seeking local recommendations and services.

Why OpenDi.us + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on OpenDi.us, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to OpenDi.us through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on OpenDi.us.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on OpenDi.us, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate OpenDi.us + Synup?

The OpenDi.us integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the OpenDi.us integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the OpenDi.us logo to manage the Synup + OpenDi.us integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: Opendi is one of the top business directories globally.
